ocr_findings.description: '出所' used in OCR for the URL label; image shows '出典' or similar label — minor rendering difference, content URL is correctly captured.
Image decorative elements (monitor icon, stationery illustration, dog mascot) replaced with image placeholders — acceptable for chapter title page.

reviewer_notes: Chapter 12 (ソフトウェア) title page with intro paragraph, learning points bullet list, IPA syllabus URL, and subject positioning table. Heading '第12章' and chapter title correctly captured. Table for exam subject areas (ストラテジ系/マネジメント系/テクノロジ系) fully rendered. Substantial body content exists but this is a chapter-opener with no lesson-level instruction — chapter_title classification is appropriate.
